title: begonia antioquensis
intro: Begonia antioquensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae, commonly known as a tropical begonia. It is native to Colombia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Begonia antioquensis typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
